description: Hub serves embedded dashboard HTML at root path
then: Returns 200 with Content-Type text/html containing the dashboard UI

description: Projects register with hub via POST
given: Hub is running, no projects registered
then: Returns 200 with { id, name, rootPath } where id is deterministic hash of rootPath

description: Re-registration updates metadata without duplicating
when: POST /api/projects/register with same rootPath but different name
then: Returns same id, updates name and project metadata, does not create duplicate entry

description: Registration requires rootPath
when: POST /api/projects/register with empty body or missing rootPath
then: Returns 400 with { error: 'Missing rootPath' }

description: Unregister removes project and broadcasts event
then: Returns 200 { ok: true }, project removed from list, SSE broadcasts project-unregistered

description: Unregister nonexistent project returns 404
then: Returns 404 { error: 'Not found' }

description: List projects returns all registered projects
then: Returns 200 { projects: [{ id, name, rootPath, registeredAt, lastPushAt, astIsStub }] } with 2 entries

description: Push health state stores data and broadcasts SSE update
given: Project 'bar' is registered, browser connected via SSE
when: POST /api/push with { projectId: 'bar-id', type: 'health', data: { summary: {...} } }
then: Returns 200 { ok: true }, state stored, SSE receives event: state-update with { projectId, type: 'health' }

description: Push to unregistered project returns 404
then: Returns 404 { error: 'Project not registered' }

description: Push unknown state type returns 400
then: Returns 400 { error: 'Unknown state type: invalid' }

description: Push supports all 6 state types
when: POST /api/push with type = health | tokens | tokenFile | swarm | graph | project
then: Each type stores data in the correct state field and returns 200

domain_conventions.tokenFile_requires: filePath field in body alongside data

description: Push body size limited to 256KB
then: Connection terminated or 413 returned

description: Push event broadcasts to SSE clients with project filter
given: Project 'bar' registered, SSE client connected with ?project=bar-id
when: POST /api/event with { projectId: 'bar-id', event: 'file-change', data: { path: 'src/foo.ts' } }
then: SSE client receives event: file-change with data including project field

description: Event body size limited to 16KB
then: Connection terminated or 413 returned

description: Query returns stored state with defaults for null fields
given: Project 'bar' registered, no health data pushed yet
then: Returns 200 with default { summary: { healthScore: 0, totalFiles: 0, ... } }

description: Query nonexistent project returns 404
then: Returns 404 { error: 'Not found' }

description: Token file query decodes URL-encoded paths
then: Returns the stored token data for that file

description: SSE sends initial project list on connect
then: First event is type 'connected' with data { projects: [...] }

description: SSE filters events by project when ?project= specified
given: Projects 'alpha' and 'beta' registered, SSE client with ?project=alpha-id
when: State pushed to both alpha and beta
then: SSE client only receives events for alpha, not beta

description: SSE heartbeat prevents connection timeout
then: Client receives :heartbeat comment line

description: Decision response is forwarded via SSE
then: SSE broadcasts event: decision-response with { decisionId, selectedOption, respondedBy: 'human', timestamp }

description: WebSocket sends welcome message on connect
given: Hub is running with WS enabled
then: Receives { topic: 'hub:health', event: 'connected', data: { clientId, authenticated } }

description: WebSocket subscribe and receive topic messages
when: Client sends { type: 'subscribe', topic: 'project:abc:*' } then a message is published to project:abc:file-change
then: Client receives { topic: 'project:abc:file-change', event: '...', data: {...} }

description: WebSocket wildcard matching uses trailing :* only
when: Messages published to project:abc:file-change and project:def:file-change
then: Client receives project:abc:file-change but NOT project:def:file-change

domain_conventions.wildcard_rule: trailing :* only — prefix match up to and including the colon before *

description: Unauthenticated WS clients cannot publish
given: Hub has authToken configured, WS client connected without token
when: Client sends { type: 'publish', topic: '...', event: '...', data: {} }
then: Receives error { message: 'Authentication required to publish' }

description: WebSocket heartbeat terminates unresponsive clients
when: 30s heartbeat interval passes and client does not respond to ping
then: Client connection is terminated

description: POST/DELETE require bearer token when HEX_DASHBOARD_TOKEN is set
then: Returns 401 { error: 'Unauthorized' }

description: GET requests bypass auth
then: Returns 200 with project list (auth not checked for GET)

description: CORS allows localhost origins only
then: Response includes Access-Control-Allow-Origin: http://localhost:3000

description: OPTIONS preflight returns 204 with CORS headers
then: Returns 204 with Allow-Methods and Allow-Headers

description: Daemon writes lock file on start
then: Lock file created with { pid, port, token, startedAt, version }

description: Daemon cleans up lock file on graceful shutdown
given: Daemon is running with lock file
then: Lock file is removed, SSE clients disconnected, server closes

description: Project ID is deterministic from rootPath
when: makeProjectId is called twice with same path
then: Returns identical id both times (basename + hash of full path)

domain_conventions.note: Must match TypeScript implementation exactly for cross-language compatibility
